SEARCH

Package com.falkordb

@NullMarked package com.falkordb
Core FalkorDB client API: the FalkorDB driver factory plus the Driver, Graph, and result-reading interfaces (ResultSet, Record, Header, Statistics) used to run queries and read their results.

This package is NullMarked: an unannotated type usage is non-null, and the nullable ones are explicitly annotated Nullable.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.falkordb.exceptions
    Exceptions thrown by the FalkorDB client, principally GraphException.
    com.falkordb.graph_entities
    Graph entity value types returned by query results: Node, Edge, Path, Point, and their Properties.
  • Class
    Description
    AsyncFalkorDB
    Factory for AsyncGraph, an asynchronous view over a synchronous Graph.
    AsyncGraph
    An asynchronous view over a Graph: every method mirrors the synchronous Graph operation of the same name but runs it on a caller-supplied Executor and returns a CompletableFuture.
    Driver
    An interface which aligned to FalkorDB Driver interface
    FalkorDB
    FalkorDB driver factory
    FalkorDB.Builder
    A fluent builder for a Driver, created via FalkorDB.builder().
    Graph
    An interface for a FalkorDB graph.
    GraphContext
    An interface for a FalkorDB graph with context.
    GraphContextGenerator
    An interface for generating a FalkorDB graph with context.
    GraphPipeline
    An interface which aligned to Jedis Pipeline interface
    GraphTransaction
    An interface which aligned to Jedis transactional interface
    Header
    Query response header interface.
    Header.ResultSetColumnTypes
    The type of a column in a result set.
    Record
    Container for Graph result values.
    ResultSet
    Hold a query result
    Statistics
    An interface for the statistics of a result set.
    Statistics.Label
    Different Statistics labels
